//: ENTERPRISE ENFORCEMENT. Deploy as managed-settings.json (highest precedence; users cannot override). allowManagedHooksOnly=true blocks all user/project hooks, so the audit hook cannot be removed or disabled. Replace <ADAPTER_DIR> with the absolute deploy path. Deliver the ingest URL+token via MDM to the config path or PROMPT_AUDIT_GATEWAY_* env. Managed paths: macOS /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/  Linux /etc/claude-code/  Windows C:\Program Files\ClaudeCode\
